• SK Hynix has 2 versions of its stock: one on Korea market and the ADR version recently listed on Nasdaq
• Each ADR is 1/10 of the local share and currently trading at a large premium
• Premium exist because US/global investors strongly prefer the ADR + easier custody/settlement + local Korean shares harder to access
• Conversion of the stock is 1-way
